description: Account has role MANAGER / MEMBER_LEVEL — not PRIMARY_OWNER. Exercises role-gating logic. Two locations with 10 reviews each across a dental practice.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev001
200000001.comment: First time at the dentist in 4 years (anxiety has kept me away). Dr. Chen was extraordinarily patient and explained every step. No judgment, no rush. First positive dental experience of my adult life.

reviewReply.comment: Emily, we're so proud of you for taking that step! Dental anxiety is real and Dr. Chen specializes in exactly this. We'll be here for your next visit, same calm energy. 😊

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev002
200000001.comment: Professional and efficient. Cleaning was thorough, hygienist explained everything clearly. Wait time was exactly as estimated. Would have given 5 stars but the parking situation is frustrating.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev003
200000001.comment: Competent care but bedside manner could be warmer. Felt a bit like an assembly line. The technology is modern and the cleaning was thorough but didn't feel particularly personal.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev004
200000001.comment: Had an emergency crown on a Friday afternoon and they fit me in within 2 hours. The crown itself is the best-fitting I've had in 20 years of dental work. Absolute lifesavers.

reviewReply.comment: Harold, dental emergencies don't wait and neither do we! We're so glad we could get you sorted quickly. That crown should last you decades!

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev005
200000001.comment: Switched from my previous dentist of 8 years after a recommendation and I'm glad I did. The hygienist here is much more gentle. Digital X-rays are a nice tech upgrade too.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev006
200000001.comment: Billing was a mess. Quoted one price, charged another. When I questioned it they said the insurance estimate was 'just an estimate'. Fine, but a $180 difference was a shock. Admin needs to communicate more clearly.

reviewReply.comment: James, billing surprises are stressful and we hear you. We've implemented a pre-treatment cost confirmation for all insurance claims. Please contact billing and we'll review your account.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev007
200000001.comment: Brought my 6-year-old for her first dentist appointment. The team were incredible with her — stickers, a prize at the end, patient explanations. She actually asked when we can go back. Success!

reviewReply.comment: Karen, a child who wants to come back to the dentist is the greatest compliment we can receive! We'll have extra stickers ready for her next visit. 🌟

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev008
200000001.comment: Very thorough cleaning and honest assessment. Was told I needed two fillings and they showed me the X-rays to explain why. Appreciated the transparency rather than just scheduling without explanation.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev009
200000001.comment: Teeth whitening results were dramatic in a good way — 6 shades lighter, still looking natural. Everyone at work noticed without me saying anything. The process was comfortable and the team checked in constantly throughout.

reviewReply.comment: Monica, 6 shades! You're glowing! The key is keeping it natural-looking and we're so glad it landed right. Enjoy your new smile! ✨

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev010
200000001.comment: The practice itself is excellent but the appointment system is frustrating. Hard to get a call back when leaving a voicemail. Online booking portal sometimes shows slots that aren't actually available. Fix the tech, quality of care is 5 stars.

reviewReply.comment: Nathan, thank you — you're right that the booking experience hasn't matched our care quality. We're migrating to a new scheduling platform in July. Your patience means a lot.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev001
200000002.comment: The Invisalign journey took 14 months and the results are life-changing. Dr. Patel checked in at every step and made two refinement trays at no extra charge when we weren't at 100%. Couldn't be happier.

reviewReply.comment: Olivia, 14 months of patience — and a lifetime of results! Dr. Patel is so proud of your progress. You were a fantastic patient. 🦷

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev002
200000002.comment: Back Bay location is beautifully fitted out and very modern. Implant consultation was thorough with a 3D scan and clear treatment plan. Felt fully informed going into the procedure.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev003
200000002.comment: Had 3 implants placed over 6 months. The process was explained in detail at each visit. Pain management was excellent and recovery was faster than predicted. The final result looks completely natural — people don't know they're implants.

reviewReply.comment: Quinn, that's exactly what great implants should look like — invisible! Thank you for trusting us with a 6-month journey. Results like yours make our work meaningful. 🙏

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev004
200000002.comment: Good care but very sales-focused. Every visit seemed to end with a pitch for another service or upgrade. I understand they're a business but it gets old. Actual dental work was solid.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev005
200000002.comment: Orthodontic consultation was professional and the treatment plan competitive with other quotes I got. Staff are friendly and the location is convenient for downtown workers. Scheduled second appointment already.
